before_code:
module adder_8bit (
  input [7:0] a,
  input [7:0] b,
  input cin,
  output [8:0] sum,
  output cout
);

  always @(a) begin
    {cout, sum} = a + b + cin;
  end

endmodule
after_code:
module adder_8bit (
  input [7:0] a,
  input [7:0] b,
  input cin,
  output [8:0] sum,
  output cout
);

  always @(a or b or cin) begin
    {cout, sum} = a + b + cin;
  end

endmodule
